name.en: Mu Ko Ang Thong Marine National Park
name.nl: Mu Ko Ang Thong Marine National Park

address: Mu Ko Ang Thong National Park, Gulf of Thailand, Surat Thani
opening_hours: Marine-park access depends on weather and tour operations

description.en: The strongest full-day trip from Koh Samui and the best way to give the island real range beyond beaches and hotel time.
description.nl: De sterkste dagexcursie vanaf Koh Samui en de beste manier om het eiland echte variatie te geven buiten stranden en hoteltijd.

metaTitle.en: Ang Thong Marine Park from Koh Samui | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Ang Thong Marine Park vanaf Koh Samui | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Ang Thong is still the best full-day excursion from Koh Samui and how to use it as the island's main non-resort day.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Ang Thong nog steeds de beste dagexcursie vanaf Koh Samui is en hoe je het gebruikt als de belangrijkste niet-resortdag van het eiland.

enhanced_description:
Ang Thong is the Samui day trip that actually changes the feel of the island. Too many itineraries keep Samui locked inside beach, pool, and dinner repetition. Ang Thong fixes that by giving the trip one proper marine-park day with open-water scenery, limestone islands, viewpoints, and a different sense of scale in the Gulf.

That is why it belongs near the top of a first Samui plan. If you only keep one major excursion, this is usually the right one. It does more for the trip than stacking a handful of inland roadside stops, and it makes the island itself feel less sealed inside resort routines.
detailed_history: Tourism Authority of Thailand planning material still centers Koh Samui itineraries around Mu Ko Ang Thong, and the Department of National Parks remains the park authority source for the protected area. That combination matters because it confirms Ang Thong as both a tourism staple and a real protected-landscape stop, not just a boat operator add-on.
visitor_experience: Expect a full day shaped by boat timing, sea conditions, and operator logistics. The value here is not only one lagoon or one photo point, but the sense of leaving Samui's hotel belt behind for a proper national-park outing. It works best when you treat it as the day's main purpose and avoid overpacking the rest of the schedule.

best_time_to_visit.time_of_day: Morning departure with calmer weather windows
best_time_to_visit.crowd_level: Can be busy in high season, with access shaped by weather and operator schedules

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Most visitors join a boat trip from Koh Samui rather than arranging the park as an independent transfer.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: This is usually the main excursion of the day rather than something paired with additional Samui inland stops.
practical_info.food_options: Tour logistics often shape meals, so it is better to treat food as secondary to the excursion itself.
practical_info.shopping: Not a shopping stop; the point is protected scenery and time on the water.

insider_tips: Use this as the one major excursion of the trip instead of trying to fit multiple smaller detours around it.
Check weather and sea conditions before departure because marine access is more important than rigid itinerary timing.
Do not assume the day is interchangeable year-round; boat comfort and visibility can shift with conditions.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on Tourism Authority of Thailand itinerary framing and the Department of National Parks official park reference. Park fees, route details, and sailing conditions can change and should be rechecked before departure.
cultural_significance: Ang Thong gives Koh Samui its strongest protected-landscape counterweight to resort life and remains the clearest reason to leave the island proper for one day.

contentSources.name: Mu Ko Ang Thong National Park
